title: Ore Highlighter
body:
This is a simple texture pack that highlights all ores you can find in the overworld and nether.

After 150,000 downloads on PMC, now here on Modrinth!

![The Overworld](https://cdn-raw.modrinth.com/data/VyRiDYFi/images/775bba23f6a35c68577fca1bd866d612c8a2e7c1.png)

![The Nether](https://cdn-raw.modrinth.com/data/VyRiDYFi/images/76596d3e34763a1fd37c7d8d2a883305a88e40d8.png)
